texto: I strongly disagree that we should not judge other people. Wisdom means good judgement. Those who fail to judge wisely often fall victim to superficial deceits. However, we should: Judge ourselves before judging others; Judge their hearts not their clothes;Judge their actions not their words;Judge the present not the past.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Melissa M.L. Wong sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “I strongly disagree that we should not judge other people. Wisdom means good judgement. Those who…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, judgement, judge, útil em momentos de sabedoria.
